hero_layout: split — portrait/visual on one side, text on the other
hero_height: auto — natural content height, no forced height
nav_style: side dots — floating dot indicators on the side
scroll_animation: playful — elements slide/bounce in from different directions
hover_effects: expressive — tilt, glow, border animations, underline slides
border_radius: mixed — sharp sections with rounded cards
spacing_density: tight — compact, lots of content visible
quirk: every section uses a different background color
